task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: (1) RenameRequest struct correctly defined in api/types.go with proper json tags; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go correctly POSTs to /api/rename; (3) Server.RenameHandler in server/routes.go implements required logic with proper error handling (404 for missing source, 409 for existing destination); (4) Route registration correctly wired at r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler); (5) CLI command with cobra.ExactArgs(2) properly defined; (6) CLI RenameHandler correctly calls client.Rename; (7) No existing code modified, all additions are new functions only. RenameModel function in server/images.go correctly implements atomic copy-then-delete operation. Implementation follows existing code patterns and maintains consistency with similar features like Copy.
